vivid/border/radius/sm.$description: A small border radius for smaller elements like checkboxes.

vivid/border/radius/md.$description: A medium border radius for general use across a wide range of components and surfaces.

vivid/border/radius/lg.$description: A large border radius for larger surfaces, such as cards or modals.

vivid/border/radius/full.$description: A pill-shaped border radius that creates fully rounded corners, often used for buttons or badges.
